LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicManufacture.label: basique manufacturing process
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicManufacture.description: Start you journey of learning to manufacture doberkin tech with the basique manufacturing process.
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicProtectives.label: protections basiques
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicProtectives.description: Apprend à fabriquer l’équipement tactique de base porté par les doberkins.
LanguageData.Doberkin_CivilianApparels.label: vêtements civils
LanguageData.Doberkin_CivilianApparels.description: Apprend à fabriquer certains vêtements de base portés par la majorité de la population doberkin de la Fédération doberman.
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicKinetics.label: basique cinétique weapons
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicKinetics.description: Learn how to manufacture basique cinétique firearms, commonly used by the doberkin army.
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicMelee.label: basique melee weapons
LanguageData.Doberkin_BasicMelee.description: Learn how to manufacture basique melee weapons, commonly used by the doberkin army.
LanguageData.Doberkin_Ration.label: DF meat ration
LanguageData.Doberkin_Ration.description: Learn how to cook some DF meat rations, a staple food item of the doberman federation.
LanguageData.Doberkin_DobermanApparel.label: doberman apparels
LanguageData.Doberkin_DobermanApparel.description: Learn how to craft some simple apparels for dobermans.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedManufacture.label: avancé manufacturing process
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedManufacture.description: Now you've learned the basique manufacturing processes, it's time to move up to avancé manufacturing processes.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedFabrication.label: avancé fabrication process
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedFabrication.description: Allows you to learn how to fabricate doberkin avancé component.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedVisors.label: visors
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedVisors.description: Learn how to manufacture a viriety of combat visors capable of turning the tide of any battlefield.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvasncedKinetics.label: avancé cinétique weapons
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvasncedKinetics.description: Learn how to manufacture avancé cinétique firearms, commonly used by élite doberkin operators.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedMelee.label: avancé melee weapons
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedMelee.description: Learn how to manufacture avancé melee weapons, commonly used by élite doberkin operators.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedProtectives.label: protections avancées
LanguageData.Doberkin_AdvancedProtectives.description: Apprend à fabriquer des protections avancées doberkin.
LanguageData.Doberkin_AV.label: véhicule aérien
LanguageData.Doberkin_AV.description: Apprend à construire le véhicule aérien intercontinental des doberkins.
LanguageData.Doberkin_DobermanApparel_Advanced.label: avancé doberman apparels
LanguageData.Doberkin_DobermanApparel_Advanced.descri: Learn how to craft some avancé apparels for dobermans.
LanguageData.Doberkin_EnergyWeapons.label: armes énergétiques doberkin
LanguageData.Doberkin_EnergyWeapons.description: Apprend à fabriquer des armes énergétiques avancées de la Fédération doberman.
LanguageData.Doberkin_PulseWeapons.label: à impulsion weapons
LanguageData.Doberkin_PulseWeapons.description: Learn how to manufacture weapons exclusively used by élite warriors of the doberman federation.
LanguageData.Doberkin_HighCommander.label: high commandant gears
LanguageData.Doberkin_HighCommander.description: Learn how to manufacture gears used by the respected high commanders.
